title: Rewards & Progression
body: Earn Points for completed games Daily streaks and levels Simple My Progress and rewards UI Player wishes and Point transfers Streak protection using Points Admin rules, rewards, redemptions and adjustments

title: Daily stats and privacy
body: Player rows on Stats can now be expanded to show results grouped by day, including time, mistakes and hints. Profiles now include a Show my stats to others setting. Stats privacy is enforced by Supabase RLS; private stats remain visible to their owner and administrators.

title: Hidden players are now fully hidden
body: Fixed player hiding so it applies to all user-owned activity, not only the profile card. Hidden players are now excluded from public statistics, leaderboards, online presence, teams, feedback, votes, reactions and pokes. Admins can still see everything.

title: Smooth end-of-game rating flow
body: Fixed the solved panel briefly showing Play again before the difficulty question loaded. It now shows a short finalising state and then displays the correct rating prompt without flickering between layouts.

title: Reliable What’s New reactions
body: Fixed thumbs-up and thumbs-down reactions reverting after selection by saving them through an atomic authenticated database function.

title: Accounts & sign-in
body: Email code sign-in, Google sign-in, and passkey support. No passwords, and no confusing magic links.

title: Stats tracking
body: Every solved puzzle records your time, mistakes, and hints used — see it all on the Stats page.

title: Teams
body: Create a team, join as many as you like, add other players, or leave any time. Private profiles can't be added by anyone but themselves.

title: Challenge mode
body: One attempt per puzzle per day, the exact same puzzle for everyone, locked to real calendar dates. Miss a day? You can still catch it up later — still just one shot.

title: Mood status
body: Set a short status next to your name, visible to everyone.

title: Post-puzzle difficulty rating
body: Tap a bar right after solving to say how hard it felt. See the group's average difficulty before you even start a puzzle.

title: Feedback board
body: Suggest ideas, upvote other people's. Admin can mark things done with a comment.

title: Who's online
body: See who else currently has the app open and what they're playing. Tap someone to send them a fun poke.

title: Renamed to I'mBoredToday
body: New name, new playful font across the whole app.

title: Fixed mistake counting in Tango
body: Mistakes now only count when Hint actually catches something wrong — not on every tap. Matches how Queens already worked.

title: Nicer button hover/press effects
body: Every nav icon now has a springy lift on hover and a satisfying press on tap, each in its own accent color.

title: Difficulty rating redesigned
body: Switched from a tap-anywhere triangle to discrete tappable bars, matching watchOS's effort rating pattern.

title: Feedback form simplified
body: Down to a single text box instead of separate title and description fields.

title: Admin: hide a player
body: Admin can make a player invisible to everyone but themselves, enforced by the database itself, not just the UI.

title: Online widget redesign
body: Moved next to your profile, wiggles when others are online, expands into a list you can tap to poke someone.

title: Nav menu collapsed into one button
body: Profile, Feedback, Stats, Teams, and Sign out now live behind a single avatar button instead of cluttering the top bar.

title: Fixed missing Home buttons
body: Teams, Stats, Feedback, Profile, and the Challenge screen all had a barely-visible back arrow — replaced with a clear, labeled Home button everywhere.

title: Feedback notification badge
body: The nav button now wiggles with a purple count badge whenever there's open feedback waiting to be reviewed.

title: Fixed online status
body: You now show as online for the whole time the app is open, not just while mid-puzzle.

title: Fixed a login-breaking bug
body: A database policy had an infinite recursion bug that could block sign-in entirely. Fixed at the database level.

title: This page
body: Release notes are now fully automatic, synced from a changelog file on every deploy — nobody types these in by hand.

title: Release notes cleanup
body: Removed manual post/delete controls (the changelog file is the single source of truth now) and added version numbers to every entry.

title: Stats split by Challenge/Practice
body: Toggle between the two — practice is unlimited so its counts aren't really comparable, challenge is the fair one-shot-a-day metric. Each game shown separately, plus a total.

title: Fixed the mystery hide button
body: Admin's player-hide toggle only had a hover tooltip, which does nothing on a phone. Now has a visible text label.

title: Fixed release notes not updating
body: The sync used 'ignore-duplicates', which skips any entry that already exists instead of updating it. Switched to 'merge-duplicates' so edits to CHANGELOG.json actually take effect on already-synced entries.

title: Fixed missing Home button on the Solved! screen
body: The post-puzzle rating screen (challenge and practice mode both) had no way back to Home at all — only its own continue button. Added a back arrow, top-left.

title: New game: Mini Sudoku
body: 6x6 sudoku, verified unique every time, difficulty scales through the week via clue count. Hint uses real solving techniques (naked/hidden singles, contradiction test) — never a guess. Works in both Challenge and Practice mode, same as the others. Also brought Queens/Tango/Zip's fonts in line with the rest of the app.

title: New admin screen: Players
body: Lists every signed-up player, not just ones who've played something (unlike Stats' hide toggle, which only shows players with game history). Admin-only, hide/unhide from here.

title: Mini Sudoku redesigned
body: White cells throughout, bold black for given numbers vs. light gray for your own entries (not blue), a green outline for the selected cell instead of a filled tint, and a proper 4-column number pad with Erase and Undo built right in.

title: Mode indicator while playing
body: A Challenge/Practice pill now shows the whole time you're playing, and tapping it switches modes without backing out to Home first.

title: Cleaned up the online widget
body: No longer shows "1 online" when that one person is just you.

title: Last seen tracking
body: The admin Players screen now shows when each player was last active, not just whether they're online right now.

title: Best times leaderboard
body: Expanding a completed challenge day now shows the fastest 5 times for that specific day.

title: Added a favicon
body: The browser tab now shows an actual icon instead of a blank one.

title: New admin screen: Games
body: Control which games show on the home screen, whether they're playable or "coming soon", and their display order.

title: Choose your default mode
body: New setting on the Profile screen: pick whether you land in Challenge or Practice mode after logging in.

title: Fixed a gap in the new Games admin screen
body: It didn't check admin status internally — the database would've blocked a non-admin from actually saving changes, but the screen would misleadingly let them try. Fixed.

title: Fixed Queens sometimes requiring a guess
body: Found the real cause: some puzzles needed a brute-force deduction technique that's essentially unspottable by eye. Generation now rejects any layout that ever needs it — every hint step is now something a person could actually reason out, verified across dozens of test puzzles at every size.

title: Played-today badge on Home
body: See at a glance which games you've already completed today's challenge for, without opening each one.

title: Reset now counts as a mistake in Queens
body: Starting over after making progress counts against you, same spirit as everything else.

title: Hint cooldown, admin-configurable
body: Admin can set how long Hint locks after each use, per game, with an optional per-day ramp so it can get stricter as difficulty increases through the week. Off by default everywhere.

title: Sudoku flashes a completed section
body: Finish a row, column, or box correctly and it briefly pulses, not just the final win.

title: Fixed hidden games flashing visible
body: A hidden game would show briefly on every page load before disappearing. The config was loading async and defaulting to "show everything" in the meantime — now waits for the real answer first.

title: Rating moved onto the game screen
body: No more jumping to a separate page after solving — the difficulty rating now appears right on the completed board. Challenge mode hides "Play again" since it's one attempt only; your result stays visible on the challenge screen's day list any time.

title: Fixed What's New showing entries out of order
body: The sort relied on a timestamp that got recomputed differently every time the sync ran, so entries pushed at different times could interleave wrong. Now sorts by version number, which is fixed and never changes, and switched dates to a fixed value too so they stop drifting.

title: Thumbs up/down on What's New
body: React to any update — thumbs up if it's working, thumbs down if it's not. A thumbs-down automatically creates an entry on the Feedback board (with an optional note about what went wrong), so it's actually followed up on, not just a silent downvote.

title: Fixed Undo/Reset working after solving
body: Undo and Reset stayed clickable even after a puzzle was solved. Undoing the winning move and re-entering it triggered a second save attempt, which hit the once-a-day database limit and kicked you to "already completed" with no explanation. Both are now locked the moment a puzzle is solved, across all four games.

title: Difficulty rating collapses after you pick
body: Instead of staying open, it now shrinks to a small confirmation pill so the completed board underneath gets the space back.

title: Gameplay fixes across all puzzle modes
body: Difficulty rating now closes the solved overlay and leaves a compact rating indicator on the read-only board. Mini Sudoku hints reveal the correct number, incorrect entries increment mistakes immediately, hint cooldowns resist rapid repeated clicks, and dashboard activity is separated between Challenge and Practice.

title: Admin: reset today's challenge
body: Admins can reset today's saved challenge results for an individual game from the Games admin screen, allowing everyone to replay that day's challenge.

title: Release notes workflow repaired
body: Updated checkout to the Node.js 24-compatible action, added clear secret and changelog validation, and made Supabase errors visible in GitHub Actions instead of failing without a useful response body.

title: Clearer difficulty rating feedback
body: After choosing a difficulty, the solved panel now briefly confirms that the rating was saved before returning to the board. The saved rating is shown as a compact six-bar indicator matching the original picker, with the selected level highlighted.

title: Clearer reactions on What's New
body: Thumbs up and thumbs down now always show their counts and update immediately. Your selected reaction changes colour, tapping it again removes it, and choosing the opposite reaction switches your vote instead of allowing both.

title: What's New reactions now persist
body: Fixed release-note reactions reverting immediately after selection by using explicit insert, update and delete operations instead of an RLS-sensitive upsert.

title: Admins can hide What's New entries
body: Admins can now hide or show individual What's New entries. Hidden updates remain visible to admins with a clear badge, are excluded for ordinary players, and retain their existing reaction counts.
